tag_descriptions.Protected Mode: Impinj Protected Mode renders a tag invisible to an RFID reader unless the reader first provides the correct 32-bit access password. This prevents unauthorized access, reading, or cloning of the tag.
tag_descriptions.FastID: Impinj FastID enables tags to backscatter their EPC and TID in a single inventory response, eliminating the need for separate TID read operations and improving throughput.
tag_descriptions.TagFocus: Impinj TagFocus allows readers to silence already-inventoried tags to reduce redundant reads, allowing the reader to focus on unread tags. Targets tags in session S1.
tag_descriptions.Tag Quieting: Impinj Tag Quieting allows readers to silence already-inventoried tag subpopulations, reducing tag churn and improving read accuracy in dense tag environments.
tag_descriptions.Gen2X Configuration Retrieval: Retrieve the current Gen2X feature configuration from the reader.
tag_descriptions.Control Commands: Start and stop the radio while applying Gen2X configuration.
